reason: This is a simple Quranic verse quote (from Surah Al-Baqarah, verse 239) about prayer during times of fear. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-specific messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: (فإن خفتم فرجالا أو ركبانا فإذا أمنتم فاذكروا الله كما علمكم ما لم تكونوا تعلمون) [البقرة239]fkx
